children.heading: NEPA exception
children.label: a NEPA exception
children.text: The ministerial issuance or amendment of an organizational camp special use authorization shall not be subject to the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 ( et seq.).42 U.S.C. 4321
The authorization is issued upon a change in control of the holder of an existing authorization.
The holder, upon expiration of an authorization, is issued a new authorization.

children.label: A
children.text: to effectuate administrative changes, such as modification of the land use fee or conversion to a new special use authorization form; or

children.label: B
children.text: to include nondiscretionary environmental standards or to conform with current law.
